---
title: "Projects"
description: "Publicly available information about current and completed research projects."
---

This page presents publicly available research projects and collaborations across aerospace structures, aeroelasticity, structural dynamics, composite materials, mechanical metamaterials, additive manufacturing, and experimental mechanics.

## Current Research

Project descriptions will be updated.

## Collaborative Research

Publicly announced research collaborations will be updated.

## Research Funding

Only awarded and publicly disclosed research funding will be listed.

Confidential project information, unpublished proposals, and information restricted by collaborative research agreements will not be included.
